projects.title: Yukinu
projects.description: An open-source e-commerce platform that enables customers to discover, compare, and purchase products from multiple sellers in one place, with fast browsing, secure checkout, and a smooth user experience.

projects.title: Alarm Clock
projects.description: A simple alarm clock application that allows users to set alarms, choose alarm sounds, and receive notifications when the alarm goes off.

education.institution: Industrial University of Ho Chi Minh City
education.description: Pursuing a degree in Computer Engineering Technology, focusing on software development, embedded systems, and IoT applications.

experience.description: Developing and maintaining web applications using modern technologies such as React, Next.js, and Node.js. Collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions.
